summary: Iteration 20 - Available Teachers Endpoint Bug Fix Testing. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). All bugfixes verified: endpoint only returns users with is_available=True (not ALL users), includes real ratings from reviews collection, includes review_count field, includes is_busy and remaining_minutes fields, does NOT include available_since field, sorted by availability and rating descending.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped per request (backend only testing)

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/available-teachers - VERIFIED: Only returns users with is_available=True (query filter working correctly)
Rating field - VERIFIED: Real ratings fetched from reviews collection via aggregation (reviewee_id match)
review_count field - VERIFIED: Present and correctly populated from reviews aggregation
is_busy field - VERIFIED: Boolean field correctly marks teachers in active sessions
remaining_minutes field - VERIFIED: Shows 0 when not busy, calculates remaining session time when busy
available_since field - VERIFIED: NOT present in response (bug fixed)
Sorting - VERIFIED: Available teachers first, then busy, sorted by rating descending within each group

success_rate.frontend: N/A (skipped per testing request - backend only)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test accounts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Available Teachers endpoint (GET /api/available-teachers) fully verified. Key features: 1) Only returns users with is_available=True in database (fixed from showing ALL users) 2) Rating fetched from reviews collection via aggregation on reviewee_id 3) review_count included from same aggregation 4) is_busy=true for teachers in active sessions with remaining_minutes calculated 5) Stale sessions (>2h) auto-closed on API call 6) available_since field removed 7) Sorted: available first then busy, rating descending within groups. Current test shows 11 available teachers, all with proper fields.
mocked_api_note: No APIs are mocked. All endpoints fully functional with real MongoDB queries and reviews collection aggregation.
